About SBI Midcap Fund
SBI Magnum Midcap Fund - Direct Growth is a mid-cap mutual fund. This fund invests at least 65% of its assets in mid-cap stocks. Mid-cap stocks as classified by SEBI, are companies that rank 101st to 250th on the stock exchange as per their market capitalization.
SBI mid-cap fund also allocates assets to equities of companies other than mid-cap fund, debt and money market instruments and
